import.aiParsePrompt:
Extract the following resume text into structured JSON resume data.

Requirements:
1. Extract personal information (name, phone, email, status, target role, city, etc.)
2. Extract education history (school, major, degree, start and end dates)
3. Extract work experience (company, position, dates, responsibilities)
4. Extract project experience (project name, role, dates, description)
5. Extract skills into the skills string
6. Extract honors, certifications, and portfolio items when available
7. Extract the professional summary or self-evaluation into the summary field
8. Use "YYYY-MM" or "YYYY-MM-DD" for all dates
9. If a field is missing from the source text, return an empty string or empty array for that field

Resume text:
{{text}}

Return only a valid JSON object. Do not include markdown code fences or explanatory text. The JSON structure is:
{
  "personalInfo": { "fullName": "", "phone": "", "email": "", "photoUrl": "", "jobStatus": "", "jobTarget": "", "location": "" },
  "summary": "",
  "education": [{ "id": "", "school": "", "major": "", "degree": "", "startDate": "", "endDate": "" }],
  "skills": "",
  "workExperience": [{ "id": "", "company": "", "position": "", "startDate": "", "endDate": "", "highlights": "" }],
  "projects": [{ "id": "", "name": "", "role": "", "startDate": "", "endDate": "", "highlights": "" }],
  "honors": [],
  "certifications": [],
  "portfolio": []
}
